entries.source: Inside the live mode, the core job is: {value1}. That focus keeps the session pointed at progress instead of another long explanation.

entries.source: Inside the live mode, the goal is to turn a vague question into a focused session with examples, checks, and a useful next action.
entries.value: Inside the yanayi kai tsaye, the goal shi ne don turn a vague tambaya zuwa a mai mayar da hankali zama tare da examples, bincike, da a mai amfani na gaba action.

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: inspir ya fara da tambayoyin gwaji da al'ummomin dalibai, ya girma ta makarantu da abubuwan taro, kuma yanzu yana amfani da AI don sa koyon mutum-da-mutum ya fi saukin samu.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir began a cikin 2013 as a na jama’a tambayoyi da learning community, grew ta hanyar makarantu da dalibi networks, da daga baya developed koyon AI infrastructure da na jama’a koyarwar AI experiences.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: inspir kwatanci shafuka ya kamata be mai amfani ba tare da pretending another dandali shi ne static. bincika na hukuma tushe-tushe don the latest samfuri details.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: inspir yana wanzuwa ne don lokacin da mai koyo yake son fahimtar wani abu kuma yana bukatar wuri mai hakuri ya fara. Fim din yana gabatar da samfurin a matsayin abokin koyon jama'a kyauta don sha'awar sani, atisaye, da samun dama.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir exists don sa learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, da mai amfani don anyone tare da sha’awar sani ta hanyar kyauta na jama’a koyon kayan aikin AI da makaranta-ready learning spaces.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir exists don sa learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, da mai amfani don anyone tare da sha’awar sani, whether su suna a dalibi, uba ko uwa, malami, ko self-taught mai koyo.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a kyauta koyon AI dandali shaped ta fiye da a decade na tambayoyi, extracurricular learning, makaranta networks, da applied AI experimentation.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a kyauta koyon AI dandali tare da yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a don explanations, Socratic tutoring, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, wasan kwaikwayo, rubutu martani, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a kyauta koyon AI dandali tare da yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a don explanations, Socratic tutoring, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, rubutu martani, rubuta lamba taimako, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI tutor and learning companion for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne a malamin AI na kyauta da abokin koyo don explanations, Socratic tutoring, aikin gida coaching, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, role-kunna, rubutu martani, rubuta lamba taimako, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is being built in public.
entries.value: ana gina inspir a fili.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne an gina a kusa da na jama’a guest AI modes: Socratic tambayoyi, aikin gida alamomi, lissafi matakai, rubutu martani, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir shi ne designed a kusa da tunani, atisaye, tunawa, da explanation maimakon handing masu koyo finished work.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne ga dalibai, iyaye, malamai, da masu koyon kansu who buƙata mai mayar da hankali yanayoyin koyo na AI don explanations, tambayoyi, alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, martani, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized a kusa da alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, muhawara, bita, da explanation maimakon marar aiki kwafe amsa.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized a kusa da yanayoyin koyo such as Socratic tutoring, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, maths matakai, rubutu critique, da exam tsarawa, don haka dalibai land a cikin a ƙarin mai mayar da hankali learning hali.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: an tsara inspir a kusa da yanayin koyo masu siffofin koyarwa na musamman: alamomi, tambayoyin Socratic, tambayoyin gwaji, tuna mai aiki, kwaikwayon rawa, muhawara, ra'ayin rubutu, da tsara karatu.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized zuwa mai mayar da hankali modes such as Socratic tutoring, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, tushe critique, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: inspir separates na jama’a guest learning shafuka daga na sirri saved conversations, don haka masu koyo, makarantu, injinan bincike, da injinan amsar AI can fahimci abin da shi ne meant don be na jama’a.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir started as a Facebook shafi publishing tambayoyi da building a dabi’a na extracurricular learning.

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: inspir supports bincike da AI retrieval don na jama’a learning shafuka. Training crawlers da na sirri ko operational surfaces suna treated differently.

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the manufa itself. manufa shi ne mafi kyau samun dama don learning: clearer explanations, ƙarin atisaye, stronger sha’awar sani, da a future inda kowane yaro can reach a capable malami don kyauta ko very low cost.

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: inspir yana mayar da sha'awar sani, aikin gida, bita, da manyan tambayoyi zuwa zaman koyon AI masu jagora da ke bayani, tambaya baya, kuma su taimaka maka yin atisaye.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: Inspir wants don taimako a cikin ensuring learning ya kamata be nishaɗi da ga kowa. mu strive don a day education reaches don kowa, everywhere ta hanyar technology. farawa tare da the 1,415,422,077 a cikin India.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir went kai tsaye as a mai amfani-facing koyon AI samfuri within weeks na ChatGPT's na jama’a release.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir works tare da makarantu don offer tailored AI chat experiences ga dalibai, an gina a kusa da sirri, curriculum yana buƙatar, da the mai amfani realities na makaranta tura aiki.

entries.value: inspir: Za ka iya Koyon Komai

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: inspir.uk na gaba-generation buildout

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's katin tunatarwa mai gina shi ne designed a kusa da that tunawa mai aiki madauki: gina a deck, gwada the front, reveal the amsa, kimanta naka tunawa, da bita the misses until the ra’ayi sticks.

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir’s go-don-market grew daga an existing ba ta yanar gizo ba network na makarantu da universities that had already engaged tare da extracurricular programmes da dalibi events. Wannan network helped inspir reach fiye da one million users across the kyauta dandali da partner makarantu.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: inspir's manufa shi ne don sa learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, da mai amfani ga kowa ta hanyar kyauta na jama’a koyon kayan aikin AI.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir's manufa shi ne don sa learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, da mai amfani ta hanyar kyauta na jama’a koyon kayan aikin AI da makaranta-ready learning spaces.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's na jama’a modes let malamai tantance the samfuri ta hanyar real learning gudanarwa kafin considering a makaranta tura aiki ko a tailored aji pathway.

entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT abun ciki ingestion, structured prompting, na musamman LLM evaluation, da tushen bude engagement a kusa da RAG evaluation. na yanzu dandali lives at inspirlearning.com while the na gaba generation shi ne being an gina a cikin na jama’a ta hanyar inspir.uk da GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Inspiring individuals don be creative da capable na withstanding the AI revolution shi ne essential. Only ta providing essential products da services don kyauta don those who cannot afford su da sustaining samun dama don those who can, can the duniya pursue happiness collectively.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Maimakon ba da amsa mai tsawo, inspir tana taimaka maka ka zaɓi tushe mai sauƙi, hanya mai zurfi, ko misali mai amfani.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Koyarwa Mai Mu’amala yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Koyi ta doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, da proving mastery. manhaja builds a kai tsaye lesson canvas a kusa da naka goal maimakon turning instruction zuwa a doguwar hira. gwada: "koyar me financial modeling."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Koyi Komai tare da Malamin AI na Kyauta hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Curious game da absolutely anything? tambaya, bincika, da go zurfafa at naka pace. naka buddy makes ideas mai amfani, memorable, da mai sauƙi don gina a kan. gwada: "bayyana yadda the stock market actually works."

entries.value: Koyi ta building

entries.source: learn by doing with AI
entries.value: koyi ta doing tare da AI

entries.source: Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar aikatawa, kwatantawa, gyarawa, da tabbatar da ƙwarewa tare da malamin AI wanda ke juya burinka zuwa darasi mai aiki.

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar aikatawa, gani, kwatantawa, gyarawa, da tabbatar da ƙwarewa. App ɗin yana gina zanen darasi kai tsaye a kusa da burinka maimakon juya koyarwa zuwa dogon hira. Gwada: "Koya mini ƙirar kuɗi."

entries.source: Learn by talking, testing, debating, and exploring.
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar tattaunawa, gwaji, muhawara, da bincike.

entries.source: Learn choices, incentives, and tradeoffs
entries.value: Koyi zabi, abubuwan karfafawa, da kuma musayar ra'ayi

entries.source: Learn choices, incentives, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Koyi choices, incentives, da tradeoffs.

entries.source: Learn code, projects, and data
entries.value: Koyi lamba, projects, da bayanai

entries.source: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Koyi game da kundin tsarin mulki, dimokuradiyya, zabe, kotuna, hakkoki, ayyuka, da manufofin gwamnati.

entries.source: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Koyi bayanan waƙa, chords, sikeli, bugun waƙa, ra'ayoyin horar da kunne, da yadda ake gina waƙoƙi.

entries.source: Learn programming by building
entries.value: Koyi shirye-shiryen kwamfuta ta hanyar ginawa

entries.source: learn programming with AI
entries.value: koyi shirye-shiryen kwamfuta tare da AI

entries.source: Learn programming, debug concepts, plan projects, interpret data, and research technical questions with public AI modes that keep the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Koyi shirye-shiryen kwamfuta, gyara kuskuren lamba ra’ayoyi, tsara projects, interpret bayanai, da bincike technical tambayoyi tare da na jama’a AI modes that keep the mai koyo a cikin the madauki.

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar tambayoyi masu maida hankali, alamomi, da tunani maimakon karanta amsoshi kawai.

entries.source: learn through questions
entries.value: koyi ta hanyar tambayoyi

entries.source: Learn through realistic decisions
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar yanke shawara na gaske

entries.source: Learn through realistic decisions.
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar mai kama da gaske decisions.

entries.source: learn through stories
entries.value: koyi ta hanyar labarai

entries.source: Learn through stories
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar labarai

entries.source: Learn through stories.
entries.value: Koyi ta hanyar labarai.

entries.source: Learn with a free AI tutor for explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Koyi da malamin AI kyauta don bayani, tambayoyin Socratic, horas da aikin gida, tambayoyin gwaji, katunan tuna, muhawara, ra'ayin rubutu, taimakon coding, da tsara karatu.

entries.source: Learn words in context
entries.value: Koyi kalmomi a cikin mahallin su

entries.source: Learn words in context.
entries.value: Koyi words a cikin mahaɗi.

entries.source: Learner
entries.value: Mai koyo

entries.source: Learner-first support
entries.value: Tallafin da ke fara da mai koyo

entries.source: Learners and educators who want better questions and more useful AI learning sessions.
entries.value: Masu koyo da malamai who want mafi kyau tambayoyi da ƙarin mai amfani koyon AI sessions.

entries.source: Learners exploring {value1} topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo exploring {value1} batutuwa who want mai amfani guidance maimakon a generic amsa box.

entries.source: Learners exploring {value1} with AI support.
entries.value: Masu koyo exploring {value1} tare da AI tallafi.

entries.source: Learners exploring communication topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan sadarwa waɗanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring creativity topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan ƙirƙira waɗanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan tushe waɗanda ke son jagorar aiki maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring humanities topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Daliban da ke binciken batutuwan ilimin dan adam wadanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba daya.

entries.source: Learners exploring immersion topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan nutsuwa waɗanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring planning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan tsare-tsare wadanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba daya.

entries.source: Learners exploring practice topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan motsa jiki waɗanda ke son jagorar aiki maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring stem topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan STEM waɗanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan tunani waɗanda suke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Learners improving essays, presentations, messages, and public explanations.
entries.value: Masu koyo improving kasidu, presentations, messages, da na jama’a explanations.

entries.source: Learners memorizing ordered ideas, vocabulary, speeches, formulas, or facts that need a stronger mental hook.
entries.value: Masu koyo da suke haddace ra'ayoyin da aka tsara, kalmomi, jawabi, dabaru, ko gaskiyar da ke bukatar karfin tunani.

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Masu koyo often bincike don saƙonni kafin su know wacce AI kayan aiki hali su buƙata. Wannan shafi hanyoyi those searches zuwa the daidai na jama’a yanayin koyo.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Masu koyo often bincike tare da a samfuri su already know. mai amfani amsa ba winner-take-all; Shi ne wacce kayan aiki hali fits the job.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Masu koyo preparing kasidu, discussions, debates, interviews, ko decisions.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Masu koyo preparing don tests ko trying don tuna ideas beyond the farko explanation.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Masu koyo preparing don tests who buƙata don tuna, yi atisaye, da gyara weak spots.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Masu koyo who suna staring at a sabo fanni da buƙata the farko bayyananne foothold.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Masu koyo who do ba kawai buƙata one amsa; su buƙata a repeatable way don keep going.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke jin sun makale a farkon sabon fanni ko suke bukatar hanya mafi sauki zuwa ra'ayi mai wahala.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Daliban da suke mantawa bayan karatu kuma suke buƙatar tsarin bita mai amfani don ra'ayoyi, kalmomi, ko kayan jarrabawa.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Masu koyo who have a specific tambaya da buƙata taimako now.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Masu koyo da suke da karancin lokaci, babban manhaja, kuma suna bukatar hanyar bita ta gaskiya ba tare da nuna kamar komai yana da muhimmanci iri daya ba.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Daliban da suke tuna ra'ayoyi da kyau ta hanyar labari, kwatanci, haruffa, da misalai masu haske.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Masu koyo who fahimci mafi kyau lokacin da su can mataki zuwa a yanayi, role, ko simulated mahaɗi.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Masu koyo waɗanda ke son zanen darasi mai jagora tare da misalai, dubawa, da aiki mai ƙwazo maimakon dogon amsar hira.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Masu koyo da suke son tunawa da abubuwa, motsa jiki cikin sauri, da maki da za su iya ingantawa.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Daliban da suke son yin atisayen muhawara mai rai tare da muryoyi masu tunawa da kuma kalubale na gaskiya.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Masu koyo who want sharper judgment maimakon sauri amsa generation.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Daliban da suke son ganin dalilin da ya sa kowane matakin lissafi yake aiki, ba kawai kwafin amsa ba.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Masu koyo waɗanda suke son yin tunani a kan wani batu, gwada zato, da gina fahimta mai ɗorewa.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Masu koyo waɗanda suke son fahimtar mutane, zaɓe, da ra'ayoyi a cikin mahallin tarihi.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Masu koyo tare da a syllabus, a wa’adi, da a buƙata don karatu abin da actually yana da muhimmanci.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Masu koyo tare da limited lokaci, large goals, ko a syllabus that yana buƙatar structure.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Masu koyo working ta hanyar technical fannoni inda one unclear mataki can block the rest.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Masu koyo rubutu kasidu, karatu complex material, ko trying don judge whether a ikirari shi ne well supported.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke rubuta kasidu, labarai, imel, bayanan tallafin karatu, ko muhawara.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders comparing AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Masu koyo, iyaye, malamai, da masu gini comparing koyarwar AI experiences.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders evaluating AI tutors.
entries.value: Masu koyo, iyaye, malamai, da masu gini evaluating AI tutors.

entries.source: Learners, parents, teachers, schools, and self-taught builders
entries.value: Masu koyo, iyaye, malamai, makarantu, da self-taught masu gini

entries.source: Learners, writers, makers, and curious people who want ideas without losing direction.
entries.value: Masu koyo, writers, makers, da curious people who want ideas ba tare da losing direction.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Halin koyo yana zuwa farko

entries.source: Learning for everyone
entries.value: Koyo ga kowa

entries.source: Learning Game Master
entries.value: Kwararre kan Wasannin Koyarwa

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Jagoran Wasan Koyo yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Sa learning feel like a wasa tare da ƙalubale, matakai, maki, challenges, da boss rounds.

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Learning wasa Master Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.value: Saƙonnin Jagoran Wasan Koyo da madaukin karatu
